description: Lens style: Grey tinted lens for use in normal daylight conditions Frame style: Thin black metal frame in an aerodynamic design Oval lens for absolute style and protection from the elements Flexible hinges for durability and ease of wear Flexible nose pads made of durable rubber to hold the glasses in place, ensuring there is no friction with the skin Branding on lens in frontWarranty : 1 yrWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
